suite.name: Rpa E2E Suite

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=https://postman-echo.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=True, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

test.name: Proceso RPA E2E: extraer, registrar vía API y archivar con checklist

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: CAPA WEB: extrayendo dato de la tabla
kw.arg: CAPA WEB: extrayendo dato de la tabla
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: CAPA WEB completada: apellido extraído = Smith
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: CAPA API: registrando el dato extraído
kw.arg: CAPA API: registrando el dato extraído
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://postman-echo.com/post path_url=/post headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.34.2', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '58', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"apellido_cliente": "Smith", "origen": "rpa-practica-16"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: CAPA ARCHIVO: registrando el resultado localmente
kw.arg: CAPA ARCHIVO: registrando el resultado localmente
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Append To File
kw.doc: Appends the given content to the specified file.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Ejecutar Checklist De Calidad
Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Append To List
kw.doc: Adds ``values`` to the end of ``list``.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: CHECKLIST: Capa Web (dato no vacío): PASS
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.
Verifica las 3 capas del proceso y falla el test con un mensaje claro si alguna condición no se cumple — un checklist real, no solo un assert ciego.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Flujo completo en tres capas: Web -> API -> Archivo, cerrado con un checklist de calidad.

suite.doc: Práctica 16 — Sesión 8. Proceso RPA end-to-end: extrae un dato de una página web, lo envía a una API, lo registra en un archivo local, y cierra con un checklist de calidad sobre las 3 capas.
